title: bidens aequisquama
intro: Bidens aequisquama, also known as the two-winged beggar-ticks, is a plant species within the aster family that is native to the southeastern United States. Traditionally, Bidens aequisquama has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. Bidens aequisquama is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its dried leaves and flowers are used in herbal remedies.
